meaning: n.(南部非洲的)灌木丛生地区
examples: This is why I feel so much safer today, in the bushveld, than I once did in my home.
It is during the cool, dry winter months that aloes become a striking feature of the South African Bushveld, Highveld and Karoo.
Atlatsa operates and controls the Bokoni Platinum Mines located near the Bushveld Complex.
The Western Bushveld Joint Venture is a joint venture where Platinum Group Metals has a 74% interest and Wesizwe Platinum owns the remaining 26%.
Wilburn noted in 1995, 6% of the palladium reserve, 4% of the platinum reserve and 4% of the rhodium reserve came from the Eastern Bushveld.
